name: Rope Basket Small Cream - Threshold™
description:
Bring both style and functionality to your home decor with this Small Rope Basket from Threshold™. The small basket features a rope-wrapped metal frame to add a touch of elegance to any decor. It's round with an open top, making it great for stashing toys, books and other items in one place. Plus, carrying handles make the basket easy to move around and store in different home areas.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
